prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock LSJ (2.0L supercharged Ecotec) with a built version featuring forged internals (Mahle forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL race bearings) and a ported/polished cylinder head with Ferrea intake/exhaust valves (1mm oversized) and upgraded valve springs (Manley). Supercharger upgrade to an Eaton TVS2300 (Lysholm) with a custom pulley setup (3.2" lower pulley) and a Vibrant Performance intercooler core (4.5" thick, bar-and-plate design) for sustained 28 psi boost levels.

Forced Induction: Install a custom turbo kit utilizing a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, 58mm compressor wheel) with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a Turbosmart Race Port blow-off valve. Supporting mods include a custom 3" stainless steel turbo manifold (JE Racing), a PTP 3.5" silicone charge pipe system, and a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps for E85 compatibility.

Drivetrain & Handling: Swap the stock F40 6-speed manual transmission for a Getrag F23 (from the Opel/Vauxhall Astra VXR) with a Spec Stage 3+ clutch and a Fidanza lightweight flywheel. Suspension upgrades include Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Cobalt SS chassis), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension full set). Braking system features StopTech ST-60 big brake kit (6-piston calipers, 355mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge G-Stop stainless steel brake lines.
estetica: Aero: Install a custom Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Type RB-COBALT-SS) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Add a custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon) with a functional scoop for the intercooler. Rear wing is a custom 9 Lives Racing GT wing (30" chord, 6" height) mounted on carbon fiber pedestals.

Exterior: Full respray in BASF Glasurit 90-Line custom color ("Nuclear Lime Metallic") with a 3-stage clear coat. Vinyl wrap accents include Avery Dennison Gloss Black on the roof, mirrors, and lower rocker panels. Lighting upgrades feature LUX H8 V4 LED headlights, Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights, and Oracle Lighting RGB halo taillights with sequential turn signals.

Interior: Full Recaro SRD-E bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage by Autopower (8-point, TIG-welded, 1.75" DOM tubing) with integrated harness bars. Steering wheel is a NRG Innovations R3 (350mm, suede) with a quick-release hub. Gauges include a Defi Advance BF series 52mm boost/fuel pressure/oil temp/oil pressure gauge pod and an AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge mounted in the A-pillar.
